agents.name: java-standards
agents.description: Java 21 + Spring Boot 3.3 coding standards for SmartRetail services. Covers hexagonal architecture, package structure, Spring Data JDBC patterns, and ArchUnit rules.

agents.name: openapi-standards
agents.description: OpenAPI 3.1 design rules for contract-first REST API development. Covers schema design, naming conventions, error shapes, and code-generation constraints.

agents.name: maven-standards
agents.description: Maven 3.9 build standards including openapi-generator plugin config, multi-module layout, and code-generation workflow for SmartRetail services.

agents.name: frontend-standards
agents.description: React 18 + TypeScript 5 standards for SmartRetail MFEs. Covers component patterns, Tailwind CSS usage, Recharts integration, and @aws-amplify/auth patterns.

agents.name: sql-standards
agents.description: SQL and Flyway migration standards. Covers schema ownership rules, naming conventions, versioned migration scripts, and cross-schema join prohibition.

agents.name: testing-standards
agents.description: Testing standards for SmartRetail services. Covers unit, integration, and ArchUnit test patterns for Spring Boot services and React MFEs.
